title: Persona Entry
description: Influencer-mode persona entry. Locks a character identity (reference image set) + named generation model(s) so the pipeline produces character-consistent output. Mirrors the channel entry pattern: YAML + per-entry asset dir, auto-discovered, browsable (pick_me_when + id + keywords like the model catalog). Persona lock = switch-ON + named model (NOT preferred_provider). look/vibe/niche are CONDITIONING-ONLY (concatenated into prompt text; never read in a conditional, selector input, or routing decision). reference_images[].role/use_for are SELECTION metadata only (let the agent pick the right ref for a job) — never branched on as logic. Request matching uses match.keywords only. voice is schema-only/deferred (TTS out of scope).

pick_me_when.description: One-line catalog descriptor (mirrors the model catalog's 'pick me when'). Browsable flavor text; never branched on.

match.description: Request-matching config. Matching uses keywords only (dead-simple, like channels).

keywords.description: Lowercase phrases; a request matches this persona if it contains any of them.

models.description: Per-capability NAMED canonical model ids (the lock) — resolved against lib/providers/model_map. This is switch-ON + named model, NOT preferred_provider. At least one of still/video.

still.description: Canonical model id for identity stills (e.g. nano-banana-2; reference field image_input).

video.description: Canonical model id for reference-to-video clips (e.g. seedance-2.0; reference field reference_image_urls. wan-2.7-r2v also valid).

reference_images.description: Identity reference set (data sheet). Each entry has a path OR url plus role/use_for selection metadata. Capped at the chosen model's reference arity at wire time. WARDROBE: image_input/reference fields condition on the WHOLE reference (clothing included), so a reference's outfit carries into outputs. For per-scene outfits, either add a role:outfit reference (combined with identity-lock refs) or override wardrobe in the generation prompt — this is conditioning/selection metadata, never branch logic.

path.description: Local path relative to the persona asset dir (e.g. refs/mia_face.png).

url.description: Pre-hosted / generated reference URL (e.g. a kie-hosted output URL).

use_for.description: Selection metadata: which job types this ref serves. Conditioning/selection only — never branched on as logic.

look.description: Conditioning-only. Physical-appearance descriptor concatenated into generation prompts; never read in a conditional or routing decision.

vibe.description: Conditioning-only. Energy/tone/lighting descriptor for prompts; never branched on.

niche.description: Conditioning-only descriptor. Flavor text for prompts; never branched on. NOT used for matching.

media_profile.description: Media profile key in lib/media_profiles.py (e.g. tiktok_portrait).

voice.description: SCHEMA-ONLY / DEFERRED. Recorded for forward-compat; NOT wired to TTS in this build (persona is visuals-only for now).
